name: Skaker Gingerade
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces ginger root (or 3 oz powdered gin)
recipeInstructions:
1. If using fresh ginger root, cut it into small pieces.
2. Cut the lemon rinds into paper-thin strips and add them to the ginger or powdered ginger.
3. Pour boiling water over the mixture and let steep for 5 minutes.
4. Strain the mixture when it is perfectly cold.
5. Add two cups of lemon juice and simple syrup to taste.
6. Dilute with very cold water and ice chips.
7. In hot weather, add sprigs of mint to the glasses for added interest.
